summary: Growth Infrastructure Phase testing complete. All 4 new features (Metrics Dashboard, Orientation Feed, Invite System, Weekly Report) working correctly on backend and frontend.
seed_data_creation: Test invite code ff4cdd6e was pre-existing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Infrastructure Phase features verified: (1) MetricsDashboardSection on System tab shows 5 metrics cards, (2) OrientationFeedSection on Home tab with live indicator, (3) InviteSection on Home tab creates invite URLs, InvitePage at /invite/{code} route accepts invites, (4) WeeklyReportSection on Insights tab with distribution bars, insight text, and stats

backend_api_tests.GET /api/orientation/metrics-today: PASS - returns active_users_today, daily_question_completion_rate, day2_retention, mission_participation_rate, avg_streak
backend_api_tests.GET /api/orientation/feed: PASS - returns feed array (empty when no recent activity)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/orientation/invite/{code}: PASS - validates invite code, returns inviter_id and use_count
backend_api_tests.GET /api/orientation/weekly-report/{user: PASS - returns distribution, insight_he, streak, mission_participation

frontend_ui_tests.OrientationFeedSection_Home_tab: PASS - data-testid='orientation-feed-section' found with live indicator
